title: astragalus affinis
intro: Astragalus affinis, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus affinis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and lower blood pressure. Astragalus affinis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
